goal.original: Execute plan to-do 11.1 (visual diff verification) page-by-page. Currently on Gallery surface. User reports drift vs docs/redesign/c-stage/gallery.html. Need to align gallery header/sort/filters/slider/stats/tiles/promptdock/statusbar to mockup intent (mockups are spec, not 1:1).
goal.summary: Landing surface accepted. Gallery surface mid-port. Backend stats endpoint + service + state + canonical events landed. MpiProjectName extended with right-aligned stats slot. MpiGalleryGrid restructured to 3-zone tab bar (sort | slider | filters). MpiProgressBar visually updated to match editor slider mockup. Asset tile metadata, status bar restyle, prompt dock restructure NOT done. User reports remaining refinement needed; will resume fresh session.

pending: 11.1 — Visual diff verification (in progress; gallery surface mid-iteration; editor + editor-video + popups not yet diffed)

next_action.description: User has tested the latest gallery changes (3-zone tab layout, stats slot in MpiProjectName, restyled MpiProgressBar). User says 'almost there, needs refinement'. Boot Electron, ask user to report specific drift on the gallery surface. Pending unstarted gallery work the user already approved: (a) wire the new GET /project-stats backend into the LANDING/PROJECT-PICKER page so each project card shows its asset count + size on disk, (b) asset tile metadata overlays (top-left badge SDXL·UPSCALE / IMPORTED / VIDEO·14.74S, bottom-left filename + dims · time · prompt snippet, fav dot top-right pink), (c) prompt dock restructure (image stack ABOVE prompt box NOT inside it — anticipates multi-image future, model chip + solid pink GENERATE button right side), (d) status bar restyle (job state ● IDLE / ◌ UPSCALING CROP_002 · 38% · 0:42 left, gauges VRAM ─── X/Y RAM ─── X/Y right, tabular-nums). After gallery is ironed out, move to editor surface (editor.html) drift report.

key_decisions: Workflow: user tests in Electron, reports unacceptable drift, agent fixes, repeat. NO REDESIGN-DEVIATION annotation pass — refinements happen until user signs off.
Path X chosen over Path Y: keep MpiGalleryGrid as single owner of sort/slider/filters; do not split filters into a new component. 3-zone CSS grid layout: sort LEFT, slider CENTER, filters RIGHT.
'Name' sort dropped (per user). Only Newest/Oldest remain.

Stats slot lives inside MpiProjectName (right-aligned via margin-left: auto + leading rule). Reused across surfaces with contextual label: gallery → 'ASSETS', group history → 'ENTRIES'. Stats default to 0/0 KB when empty (not hidden).

Backend: single endpoint GET /project-stats/:projectId?folderPath=...&groupId=<opt>&itemIds=<opt>. Project mode counts media files in Media/. Group mode sums sizes from .meta/<itemId>.json sidecars for explicit itemIds list.

User explicitly asked for the new stats backend to also feed the LANDING / project-picker page (per-project card stats). NOT YET WIRED. This is the highest-priority next slice after current gallery refinements.

Image-on-prompt-box decision: in the gallery prompt dock, image stack lives ABOVE prompt box (not inline LEFT like mockup) — diverges intentionally from mockup so that future multi-image support doesn't shrink prompt box.
Mockups path is docs/redesign/c-stage/*.html (NOT docs/redesign/mockups/c-stage/*). Plan file has the wrong path — CLAUDE.md is correct.
constraints: Fresh session must read CLAUDE.md Critical Rules Snapshot before touching code: BEM mandatory, ComponentFactory.create(), no hardcoded colors (CSS vars only), no raw SVG (icons.js), no raw addEventListener in components (on/off from utils/dom.js), Events.on/emit for cross-component, Hotkeys.bind w/ registry id, ComponentFactory locked, register CSS in preloadStyles.js + types.js for new components.
Stage banned glassmorphism (no backdrop-filter), banned bouncy easing (--bounce dropped), banned neon glow.
Test on Electron desktop only (browser broken for most features per memory). User boots Electron and reports drift; agent does not run dev server / playwright unless user asks.

Stats service is started once at boot in shell.js (startProjectStats). It listens to media:imported, generation:complete, media:deleted, project:stats-dirty, history:stats-dirty, project:changed. Refetches via fetch() and writes results to state.projectStats / state.historyStats.

When wiring stats to landing/project-picker page, do NOT reuse state.projectStats (that key is for the *currently open* project). Add per-project stats lookup either: (i) extend MpiProjectCard with its own fetch (cheap, parallel), or (ii) add a batch endpoint that returns stats for all projects in one call (preferred if N is large). User has not specified — discuss with user before implementing.
Mockups are spec, not source. One-way: spec → code. Do NOT modify any docs/redesign/c-stage/*.html or docs/redesign/*.md to match implementation.

resume_prompt: Read docs/handoffs/2026-04-29-21-50-gallery-stats-port.json end-to-end before doing anything. We are mid-execution of plan to-do 11.1 in docs/plans/2026-04-29-stage-redesign-port.md. Stage redesign port is iterating on the GALLERY surface. Last session: added a GET /project-stats/:projectId backend endpoint (project mode + group mode), a projectStatsService.js, state keys projectStats / historyStats, canonical events media:deleted / project:stats-dirty / history:stats-dirty, extended MpiProjectName with a right-aligned stats slot (label switches between ASSETS and ENTRIES per page), restructured MpiGalleryGrid into a 3-zone tab bar (SORT left / slider center / filters right, dropped 'Name' sort), and visually refined MpiProgressBar to match editor mockup (4px track, pill radius, solid white knob with subtle ring). User says 'almost there, needs refinement'. THE FIRST THING TO DO: greet the user, confirm you have read the handoff JSON, the plan, and the gallery mockup, and ASK the user to boot Electron and report any remaining drift on the gallery surface. THEN, after the gallery is signed off, the next major slice the user already requested but is NOT YET DONE: wire the new /project-stats backend into the LANDING / project-picker page so each project card shows its own asset count + size on disk (decide with the user whether to extend MpiProjectCard to fetch per card OR add a batch endpoint). Other gallery work still pending: asset tile metadata overlays, prompt dock restructure (image stack ABOVE prompt box, model chip + solid pink GENERATE button), status bar restyle. Use the human-in-the-loop brief gate before writing any code (Gate 1 of /mpi-execute-next). Caveman mode is active — keep responses terse. Mockups are SPEC, not source — translate intent into BEM + ComponentFactory + CSS variables + events bus + Hotkeys + icons.js patterns. Test on Electron desktop only.
